They were quick to come out to provide an estimate, worked with us and stayed in constant communication with us throughout the entire project, and did a fantastic job. They were able to paint all of the exterior vinyl siding, the wood trim, the concrete foundation, and our shutters. Not only did they paint, but they also replaced all the damaged siding and rotting wood in addition to replace/repair the shutters we had. title: CertaPro Painters of North Bergen County
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicholas Mozer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLoQGrkNKNGkfytP34krFSGj-RY6KMGlYWZvZBB0ny-0xRTcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I can't recommend using certapro painters for a number of reasons. I wasn't going to leave a negative review, but I keep finding new issues and after the last trip Pete told me "I can't have them return again after this time".  The quality of work was not satisfactory, to the point that multiple people who were working on the house questioned if they actually used 2 coats. Despite supposedly being local, the subcontracted crew F. Junior's was not and it took weeks to get them back multiple times for touch ups that were needed. Eric","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jane Egan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNSLKYDoU5bjLx9h8p9o8J7_G0T0FSzL4jbR_RLjYySx5QrEoh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"September 4, 2020
Jimmy and his team painted my whole house and garage about 5 years ago.  I was so please with the work they did at that time and how it has held up I called them back for some additional painting and staining.

I had a damaged ceiling in my dining room and Jimmy's team took care of it and painted it so it now looks perfect.  Not only did they do an excellent job but they were as neat as can be.   I especially appreciated their prep work ensuring nothing in the room would be damaged in any way.  When they finished, my dining room was in perfect order and I didn't have to do a thing to return it to it's original order --- they did it all!  They also repaired some nail pops in my kitchen ceiling and did touch up painting in those areas.  The touch up painting  has perfectly blended with the rest of the ceiling.

Jimmy's crew also power-washed and stained my deck.  Before they started work my deck looked badly worn and beaten up by the weather over the years.  The transformation is amazing and I couldn't be happier.

Jimmy took care of all the work I needed done starting with coming over to provide an estimate in a timely manner.  Once I agreed to have the work done he scheduled my job quickly and had his crew at my house shortly after our agreement was made.  The work was done perfectly and quickly.  One last thing I want to add, I feel Jimmy's prices are more than fair, especially considering the professional work that his crew does. Based on the highest quality of work, professionalism, attention to detail and clean up Ion a scale from 1-10 I give J. Canabe Painting Company a rating of 12!!!!!   Thank you Jimmy and team!

Summer, 2010
Jimmy and his team painted my house and garage this past summer and I am so pleased with the work they did I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a great team who does an excellent job and at a reasonable price.  Jimmy was great helping me pick out colors and trim and his team got the job done right on schedule.  They were meticulous and left the surroundings nicer than they were before they started!  One thing I'd like to share which I think is so telling has to do with my concern with some rain we had following the staining of my deck.  I was concerned some of the stain may have washed off and Jimmy came to take a look.  Based on the time the staining was finished, the time the rain started and the way the deck looked, Jimmy assured me none of the stain had been washed off.  What was incredible to me is that Jimmy knew I had concern and didn't want me worried about any part of the job being compromised.  Although he didn't have to, he sent his crew back to put another coat of stain on my deck!  I'd say, that was going above and beyond and I totally appreciated Jimmy going that extra mile!  Like I started with, I would highly recommend J. Canabe Painting if you are looking for the best painting job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jim Fischer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDOHhe0eY3mOSQ_AIfj7zcgpag2Jr78L2gXuZpV2Q_x2Om-8L7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had two rooms and exterior cornices painted as part of our restoration of this 1910 townhouse. My ceiling fans were covered in paint , my leather couch had paint spatters all over it , my cabinets had paint splatter , they scratched my new floors which were 3 days old and tried to lie and say it was the glue In( even tho these floors are floating and there was no glue used anywhere ). They painted over my alarm box, all of our electrical switches, and most of the frames of my windows , they also installed new doors another disaster the doors are all cut crooked,  we were told two coats of paint and that the walls would be primed. Some of the molding was never even painted at all . Some of the walls were not even painted down to the molding so the old color was at the bottom .ed assured us he would take care of it all so he sent us one painter the following weekend. Aurin did his best to touch up as much as he could however we needed a complete repaint and that wasn’t going to happen . Ed also said he would replace all the switches and switch plates that were painted over ,, that never happened , when he came to collect payment he decided he would deduct 500 dollars , considering the floor repair was 200. We are still cleaning paint off of our furniture , I can’t get the paint off my new front door, all of my windows are ruined . I’m almost embarrassed to say we even had the house painted at this point . Nick provided a fair quote for our project and was on-site within two days for an estimate. Once we signed the contract, his crew started within two weeks, demonstrating both efficiency and reliability. They painted the entire interior of our home and the exterior foundation, and their attention to detail was impeccable. The team carefully moved and covered all furniture, ensuring that nothing was damaged or left exposed.

Beyond painting, we were so impressed that we trusted them with custom carpentry work—they built a stunning custom wood bookshelf for our bedroom. The craftsmanship was outstanding; it looks like it was always part of the home!

The crew was respectful, professional, and left everything spotless when the job was done. Their work exceeded our expectations, and we would hire them again in a heartbeat. If you’re looking for top-quality painting and carpentry work in the Westfield, NJ area, we highly recommend Grand Slam Painting!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw7t6apgE&fid=0x0:0xd0bdad098b52b15b"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Eyal Golan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiywXyhDkwAGARkJCfb6nwDIO1KDLOCkdjwyuud45YeWT8-Htm6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nothing short of amazing!

I was looking for a company to paint the entire outside of the house, it is a big old house and the paint was in bad condition when we bought the house last year so it was top priority to get the house painted this year.

I called 3-4 local companies and only Nick from Grand Slam called me back. We scheduled day and time to meet and review the job.

I met with Nick from Grand Slam at the day and time we agreed to meet, he was always punctual. We walked around the house and discussed the details of the job, I thought I was detailed but he was even more detailed, everything I asked for was communicated to the guys and was done.

The team leader Alex was very communicative. The crew couldn’t be nicer, more polite and organized.
They cleaned after them selfs daily, not that it was dirty or messy or anything, they just didn’t leave anything behind.

Once they started which was shortly after I signed the contract with Nick they were here every day at the same time early in the morning and worked until the end of the day.

The prep day was the biggest part of the job, the old wood needed a lot of care, they power washed, they sanded, they patched some spots, they sealed the wood and around the windows frames.

They removed the shutters and painted them, they painted the garage and every door, they painted the molding, they dug into the mulch and painted down to the bottom of the ground which I found amazing.

After almost 2 weeks of work me and Nick the owners became friends, he visited during the work time number of times and we discussed and exchanged different business contacts.

I recommend Nick and his company no questions asked, I own a moving company and I know how hard it is to hire good labor but Nick is a great guy with great employees.
Price was the price, no surprises.

Do not hesitate, I never got another quote.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR17K71gE&fid=0x0:0xd0bdad098b52b15b"],"When":"2023-5-5"},{"Name":"Amanda Gardner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUkjy5LDoWLYhzJJEYgVnBHS4vTxsWsaZAAGbdu81FiwmN4gA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you to Nick and the Grand Slam Painting crew for transforming our house!  Nick is great to work, he helped consult on colors and ideas for rooms and cabinets.  He worked with us on some minor changes during the project too.  Nick and his crew are friendly and hard working.   Thank you Nick and his team for making our vision be reality and our new home finally begin to feel like ours!

Highly recommend - friendly, efficient, helpful and competitively priced!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG67u6YQ&fid=0x0:0xd0bdad098b52b15b"],"When":"2021-11-10"},{"Name":"Lisa Blazek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI505A1VZF_kC9JYORs3N7XRBVOASJMgNlOQyxl891lPjBTifXT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Grand Slam painting is the best company you could ever choose for painting your cabinets!
